doc_content.summary: An end-to-end pull request workflow automation for GetEvinced repositories that handles pushing, PR creation, AI-driven self-review, and squash-merging. It utilizes a dual-authentication architecture, relying on the user's PAT for PR lifecycle operations while securely injecting an ephemeral bot token for posting code reviews natively as the CI bot.
key_features: Automated branch pushing with automatic conflict resolution fallbacks via rebase
AI-assisted PR title and conventional-commits-compliant body generation based on git diffs
Dual-auth system strictly isolating user operations from bot-issued code reviews to prevent privilege escalation
Advisory documentation state checking via project-config.json and internal GraphQL hooks
Interactive explicit user approval gate prior to executing an admin-bypassed squash-merge
usage_examples: stark-pr-flow "feat: add new retry logic" draft

alt_text: Internal architecture visualization of the stark-pr-flow skill showing the dual-auth GitHub workflow, transitioning from branch prerequisites and PR generation using the user's PAT, through bot-authenticated automated code reviews, to a final user approval gate for administrative squash merging.
